svg.title: Port filter and handshake filter reach the same scope
svg.desc: Horizontal bar chart showing that the Bitcoin port filter and BIP324 handshake filter both reduce 767 scoped Warnet flows to the same 25 candidate flows.
svg.text: Port filter and handshake filter reach the same scope
In this Warnet run, both filters reduce 767 scoped flows to the same 25 Bitcoin/BIP324 candidate flows.
A default port gives the observer this reduction almost for free; without it, the observer must infer the scope from traffic metadata.
